title: Fix CI public-safety smoke self-match
description: The GitHub Actions grep scans .github/workflows/ci.yml and matches its own secret-pattern literal, causing the initial scaffold hygiene job to fail. Replace it with a focused script that scans public content without self-matching.
close_reason: Fixed in CI smoke workflow follow-up.

title: Implement fixture-backed plan and packet commands
description: Build the first runnable CLI slice: parse services.yml plus synthetic Windows service fixtures, emit findings, and export redacted Markdown packets.

title: Add generated PowerShell and Task Scheduler output
description: Generate auditable PowerShell and scheduled task registration commands for Uptime Kuma push checks after fixture planning is verified.
